overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dark urban underpass with homeless encampments and digital billboards, transitioning through a covered tunnel into a bright industrial waterfront area with factories and smokestacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass with homeless encampment and digital billboard

events.description: character holds up cardboard sign reading 'THE END IS NEAR'
camera passes the sign holder and continues deeper into the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark underpass past a group of people gathered around a fire barrel

notable_agents.action: holding a cardboard sign reading 'THE END IS NEAR' and gesturing toward the camera

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement screen showing a muscular figure with 'All Night Every Night' text
burning metal barrel providing warm orange light and smoke
tarp and cardboard shelter constructed against the concrete wall
red and white striped road barriers blocking the right side
tall red cylindrical extinguisher mounted on a post

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark urban underpass where a small group of people have set up an encampment around a burning barrel. A large digital billboard illuminates the right side while a protester holds up an apocalyptic sign. The player walks forward past scattered debris and concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete tunnel with abandoned vehicles

events.description: leaving the encampment area and entering the darker tunnel section
tunnel ahead becomes visibly brighter as the exit approaches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit tunnel toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: derelict cars and trucks parked along the tunnel walls
exposed metal ceiling structure with fluorescent lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered tunnel, the encampment disappears behind as the player passes abandoned vehicles and concrete barricades. The artificial lighting creates a greenish hue while a bright light grows visible at the far end of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit approach with increasing natural light

events.description: bright daylight becomes dominant as the tunnel exit nears
exiting the tunnel into the bright industrial exterior

agents.ego_description: approaching the tunnel exit with increasing brightness revealing industrial structures outside

entered.detail: large industrial buildings with smokestacks visible through the bright exit

segments.scene_description: The tunnel brightens significantly as the player approaches the exit, with the dark concrete walls giving way to a blinding white light. Through the exit, industrial buildings and smokestacks become visible against a blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront promenade with factory complex view

events.description: emerging into bright direct sunlight from the dark tunnel
turning right to follow the waterfront path alongside the industrial complex

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial waterfront observing the factory buildings and smokestacks

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke against the blue sky
metal railing along the water edge with concrete base
network of large pipes and metal structures connecting buildings
tall grass and vegetation growing through cracks in the concrete

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into brilliant sunlight, the scene opens onto an industrial waterfront with massive factory complexes and smoking chimneys dominating the skyline. The player turns right along a concrete promenade, passing overgrown vegetation and metal railings while the industrial architecture fills the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gloomy urban underpass into a bright, expansive industrial waterfront. It begins in the shadows of a concrete underpass, passing a homeless encampment centered around a burning barrel and a glowing digital billboard. As the camera moves deeper into the tunnel, the encampment fades behind abandoned vehicles and concrete barricades while the lighting shifts to a sterile greenish hue. The scene then brightens significantly as the dark walls give way to a blinding white light at the tunnel's exit, revealing the silhouettes of smokestacks against a blue sky. Finally, the camera emerges into brilliant sunlight to reveal a massive factory complex and smoking chimneys, turning right along a concrete promenade lined with overgrown vegetation and metal railings.
